title: TrienowTweaks
description: A utility mod to fill in the gaps in between a plethora of mods in a custom modpack. You are welcome to use it in your modpack.
body:
![TRIENOW TWEAKS](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/logo500px.png)

# NOTE! THE CURRENT VERSION FOR 1.21.8 is in Alpha - Things won't work as expected!

A utility mod to fill in the gaps in between a plethora of mods in a custom modpack. You are welcome to use it in your modpack.

# Blocks

## ![Entity Prohibitator Block](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/3d/block/entityprohibitator.png) Entity Prohibitator

 - Prevents hostile entities from spawning in a specific chunk.
 - It must be placed at a very specific position (see the tooltip) in each chunk

 
## ![Fake Fire Block](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/3d/block/fakefire.png) Fake Fire

Decorative fire

 
## ![Invisible Light Block](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/3d/block/invisiblelight.png) Generic Light

Invisible light source

 
## ![Invisible Wall Block](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/3d/block/invisiblewall.png) Invisible Wall

You can't go over it, you can't go under it, oh no you bumped into it!

 
## ![Item Detector Block](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/3d/block/itemdetector.png) Item Detector

Outputs a Redstone signal as soon as enough items are above it. Works underwater. Removes items, if there are waaay too many, to prevent server lag. Was developed for a certain... canola power plant?

 
## ![Minecart Killer Block](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/3d/block/minecartkiller.png) Minecart Killer

Kills a minecart entity above it, when receiving a Redstone signal. You do get the item afterward. Now, only picking it up is on your to-do list.

 
## ![Railroad Truss Block variants](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/3d/block/railroadtruss.gif) Railroad Truss

A decorative railroad-ish-looking block to put tracks on. Comes in different styles

 
## ![Streetlamp variants](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/3d/block/streetlamp.gif) Streetlamp

A decorative streetlamp

 
## ![A brighter Torch Block](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/3d/block/torch2.png) Torch²

A torch that uses invisible light sources to increase its lighting range.

 
# Items
## ![Auto Food Item](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/3d/item/autofood.png) Auto Food

 - Stores lots of food and automatically feeds you when you get hungry.
 - It can be placed in a Curios slot or left in your inventory.

 
## ![Auto Light Item](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/3d/item/autolight.png) AutoLight

 - Places invisible light blocks where it's too dark.
 - It might be a bit op atm as it doesn't consume anything in return.
 - Can be placed in a Curios slot or kept in your inventory.

 
## ![World Edit Wand Item](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/3d/item/worldeditwand.png) World Edit Wand

 - A decorative item that I mapped as the world edit wand.
 - It is also used now to make invisible blocks from this mod visible (currently the wall and the light sources)

 
# Commands
## `/tt`
A utility command for server operators. Can heal, make a player invulnerable, teleport a player to a random place in the world, and more!

 
## `/treq`
Implements a teleport request system often seen on big multiplayer servers. Allows a player to accept or deny a teleport request from another player.

 
# Config Options
- An option to disable flight in certain dimensions. Comes in handy to make players to play the Twilight Forest the way it is supposed to.
- An option to make the player use the exact spawn point of the world

# Retired
These Blocks/Features aren't present in the current version of the mod.

## ![Compact Crafter Block](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/3d/block/compactcrafter.png) Compact Crafter
- Crafts with items that fill an entire 2x2 or 3x3 crafting table.
- Put an Inventory (e.g. Chests) to the left and right of the block
- It will now "compact" the items in the left chest (e.g. 9 gold ingots to a block of gold, 4 planks to a crafting table)
- It might be a bit OP currently as it doesn't consume anything in return
- Its purpose was mainly to craft small dusts into dusts from IC2 (when it used to be around)

## ![Dr. Toast Head](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/3d/item/toasthead.png) DrToast Head

 - An armor item to have toast as a head.
 - Made for a special someone.

 
## ![Knight Armor Pieces](https://cdn.trienow.de/tt/3d/item/knightarmor.gif) Knight Armor

A custom knight armor model to wear. Also made for a special someone.
